title: Linux Data Staging and Exfiltration Indicators
description: Detects data staging and exfiltration preparation on Linux hosts by identifying hosts where archiving tools (tar, zip, gzip) and network transfer tools (curl, wget, scp, nc) are used in close proximity. Multiple data handling commands on the same host suggest an attacker collecting and exfiltrating data.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (msg like '*tar *' or msg like '*zip *' or msg like '*gzip *' or msg like '*curl *' or msg like '*wget *' or msg like '*scp *' or msg like '*nc *') | stats count as staging_commands, distinctcount('Process Name') as tools_used by 'Host Name' | sort -staging_commands | where staging_commands > 4 and tools_used > 2
